narrative:
Amanda Twp township has 723 registered voters, with 41.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 51.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 45.0 percentage points.
